subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Who was the ruler during the establishment of Mewar kingdom?
question_hi: मेयुर क्षेत्र को संरक्षण में कौन से सरकार थी।
explanation_en: Maharana Kumbha was the ruler during the establishment of Mewar kingdom.
explanation_hi: मेयुर कुम्भ योजना मेरा क्या सरकार था।
